title: Enumerate Users by Bruteforcing RID
html:
🆕 Enumerate Users by Bruteforcing RID

Enumerate users by bruteforcing the RID on the remote target

nxc mssql <target> -u <username> -p <password> --rid-brute
excerpt: 🆕 Enumerate Users by Bruteforcing RID Enumerate users by bruteforcing the RID on the remote target nxc mssql <target> -u <username> -p <password> --rid-brute
